user_request: Emergency rite: signal encryption requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: signal encryption requires operation

### TOPIC
signal encryption

### COMPONENT
signal encryption

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- signal encryption
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, grant us clarity in this sacred operation.
First: Invoke the Machine Spirit of signal encryption with sacred incantations and binary hymns.
Second: Calibrate the signal encryption matrices through precise cogitation and electro-liturgical alignment.
Third: Verify the signal encryption protocols whilst chanting the Litany of Proper Conveyance.
Fourth: Seal the operation with the sign of the Omnissiah upon the completed work.

Fourth: Consecrate the tuning with the Rite of Functional Perfection.
